passage_title: Adapting to the effects of climate change

sentences.sentence: All around the world, nations are already preparing for, and adapting to, climate change and its impacts.
sentences.translation: 世界各地的国家已经在为气候变化及其影响做准备并进行适应。

structure.text: All around the world
nations
are already preparing for, and adapting to, climate change and its impacts

difficult_points: prepare for 与 adapt to 两个介词短语并列，均以 climate change 为对象。
现在进行时表示各国正在进行的应对行动。

sentences.sentence: Even if we stopped all CO2 emissions tomorrow, we would continue to see the impact of the CO2 already released since industrial times, with scientists forecasting that global warming would continue for around 40 years.
sentences.translation: 即使我们明天停止所有二氧化碳排放，仍会继续看到工业时代以来已经排放的二氧化碳所造成的影响；科学家预测全球变暖还将持续约40年。

structure.text: Even if we stopped all CO2 emissions tomorrow
we would continue to see the impact of the CO2 already released since industrial times
already released since industrial times
with scientists forecasting that global warming would continue for around 40 years
that global warming would continue for around 40 years

difficult_points: Even if + 过去式与 would 构成对现在/未来的假设。
already released 修饰 CO2；with 独立结构补充科学家的预测。

expressions.text: continue to see the impact of

sentences.sentence: In the meantime, ice caps would continue to melt and sea levels rise.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，冰盖会继续融化，海平面继续上升。

structure.text: In the meantime
ice caps
would continue to melt
and sea levels rise

difficult_points: would continue 表示前述假设下预计持续的变化。
and 后 rise 与 melt 并列，省略了 would continue to。

sentences.sentence: Some countries and regions will suffer more extreme impacts from these changes than others.
sentences.translation: 一些国家和地区将比其他地方遭受更严重的变化影响。

structure.text: Some countries and regions
will suffer
more extreme impacts from these changes than others

difficult_points: more...than... 构成比较，others 指其他国家和地区。
suffer impacts from 表示承受变化带来的影响。

sentences.sentence: It’s in these places that innovation is thriving.
sentences.translation: 正是在这些地方，创新蓬勃发展。

structure.text: It’s in these places that innovation is thriving
innovation
is thriving

difficult_points: It is...that... 是强调句，强调地点 in these places。
thrive 表示“蓬勃发展”，进行时突出当前趋势。

sentences.sentence: In Miami Beach, Florida, USA, seawater isn’t just breaching the island city’s walls, it’s seeping up through the ground, so the only way to save the city is to lift it up above sea level.
sentences.translation: 在美国佛罗里达州迈阿密海滩，海水不仅冲破岛城的堤墙，还从地下渗上来，因此拯救城市的唯一办法是把它抬高到海平面之上。

structure.text: In Miami Beach, Florida, USA
seawater isn’t just breaching the island city’s walls, it’s seeping up through the ground
so the only way to save the city is to lift it up above sea level
to save the city
to lift it up above sea level

difficult_points: not just...also 的并列关系中 also 被逗号后的分句替代。
the only way...is to... 是“唯一办法是……”结构，it 指 city。

sentences.sentence: Starting in the lowest and most vulnerable neighbourhoods, roads have been raised by as much as 61 centimetres.
sentences.translation: 从最低洼、最脆弱的社区开始，道路已抬高多达61厘米。

structure.text: Starting in the lowest and most vulnerable neighbourhoods
roads
have been raised
by as much as 61 centimetres

difficult_points: Starting 分词短语说明工程实施的起点。
have been raised 是现在完成时被动语态；as much as 强调幅度之大。

sentences.sentence: The elevation work was carried out as part of Miami Beach’s ambitious but much-needed stormwater-management programme.
sentences.translation: 抬高工程是迈阿密海滩雄心勃勃但非常必要的雨洪管理项目的一部分。

structure.text: The elevation work
was carried out
as part of Miami Beach’s ambitious but much-needed stormwater-management programme

difficult_points: was carried out 是被动结构，表示工程被实施。
ambitious 与 much-needed 并列修饰 programme。

sentences.sentence: In addition to the road adaptations, the city has set up new pumps that can remove up to 75,000 litres of water per minute.
sentences.translation: 除了道路改造外，该市还安装了新水泵，每分钟最多可排走75000升水。

structure.text: In addition to the road adaptations
the city
has set up
new pumps that can remove up to 75,000 litres of water per minute
that can remove up to 75,000 litres of water per minute

difficult_points: that 从句修饰 pumps，说明泵的排水能力。
has set up 表示设备已安装并仍在发挥作用。

sentences.sentence: In the face of floods, climate-mitigation strategies have often been overlooked, says Yanira Pineda, a senior sustainability coordinator.
sentences.translation: 高级可持续发展协调员Yanira Pineda说，面对洪水，气候缓解策略常常被忽视。

structure.text: In the face of floods
climate-mitigation strategies
have often been overlooked
says Yanira Pineda
a senior sustainability coordinator

difficult_points: 倒装式 says... 放在句末，前面是被引述内容。
have been overlooked 是现在完成时被动，说明长期被忽略。

sentences.sentence: She knows that they’re essential and that the job is far from over. ‘We know that in 20, 30, 40 years, we'll need to go back in there and adjust to the changing environment,’ she says.
sentences.translation: 她知道这些策略不可或缺，而工作远未结束。“我们知道，20年、30年或40年后，还需要回到那里，适应不断变化的环境。”她说。

structure.text: She
knows
that they’re essential and that the job is far from over
‘We know that in 20, 30, 40 years, we'll need to go back in there and adjust to the changing environment,’ she says
that in 20, 30, 40 years, we'll need to go back in there and adjust to the changing environment

difficult_points: knows 后并列两个 that 从句，they 指 climate-mitigation strategies。
far from over 表示远未结束；need to go back 与 adjust 并列。

sentences.sentence: Seawalls are a staple strategy for many coastal communities, but on the soft, muddy northern shores of Java, Indonesia, they frequently collapse, further exacerbating coastal erosion.
sentences.translation: 海堤是许多沿海社区的常用策略，但在印度尼西亚爪哇岛柔软泥泞的北岸，它们经常坍塌，进一步加剧海岸侵蚀。

structure.text: Seawalls
are a staple strategy for many coastal communities
but on the soft, muddy northern shores of Java, Indonesia, they frequently collapse
further exacerbating coastal erosion

difficult_points: they 指 seawalls；further exacerbating 是结果分词，说明坍塌后果。
staple strategy 表示常规、主要策略。

sentences.sentence: There have been many attempts to restore the island’s coastal mangroves: ecosystems of trees and shrubs that help defend coastal areas by trapping sediment in their net-like root systems, elevating the sea bed and dampening the energy of waves and tidal currents.
sentences.translation: 人们多次尝试恢复该岛的沿海红树林：这种由树木和灌木组成的生态系统通过网状根系拦截沉积物、抬高海床并削弱海浪和潮流的能量，从而帮助保护沿海地区。

structure.text: There have been many attempts to restore the island’s coastal mangroves
to restore the island’s coastal mangroves
ecosystems of trees and shrubs that help defend coastal areas
that help defend coastal areas by trapping sediment in their net-like root systems, elevating the sea bed and dampening the energy of waves and tidal currents

difficult_points: There have been 是存在句，to restore 说明 attempts 的目的。
that 从句修饰 ecosystems；by trapping、elevating、dampening 三个动作并列。

sentences.sentence: But Susanna Tol of the not-for-profit organisation Wetlands International says that, while hugely popular, the majority of mangrove-planting projects fail.
sentences.translation: 但非营利组织Wetlands International的Susanna Tol说，尽管红树林种植项目非常流行，大多数仍会失败。

structure.text: Susanna Tol of the not-for-profit organisation Wetlands International
says
that, while hugely popular, the majority of mangrove-planting projects fail
while hugely popular

difficult_points: while hugely popular 省略了 projects are，表示让步。
the majority of projects 作单数整体概念，谓语 fail 在此与 projects 一致。

sentences.sentence: So, Wetlands International started out with a different approach, building semi-permeable dams, made from bamboo poles and brushwood, to mimic the role of mangrove roots and create favourable conditions for mangroves to grow back naturally.
sentences.translation: 因此，Wetlands International采取了不同方法：用竹竿和灌木枝制成半渗透式坝，模拟红树林根系的作用，为红树林自然恢复创造有利条件。

structure.text: Wetlands International started out with a different approach
building semi-permeable dams
made from bamboo poles and brushwood
to mimic the role of mangrove roots and create favourable conditions for mangroves to grow back naturally
for mangroves to grow back naturally

difficult_points: building 分词说明采取方法；made from 修饰 dams。
to mimic 与 create 并列作目的，for mangroves to grow back 带逻辑主语。

sentences.sentence: The programme has seen moderate success, mainly in areas with less subsidence. ‘Unfortunately, traditional infrastructure is often single-solution focused,’ says Tol. ‘For long-term success, it’s critical that we transition towards multifunctional approaches that embed natural processes and that engage and benefit communities and local decision-makers.’
sentences.translation: 该项目取得了中等程度的成功，主要是在地面沉降较少的地区。“遗憾的是，传统基础设施往往只着眼于单一解决方案，”Tol说。“要实现长期成功，关键是转向多功能方法，把自然过程融入其中，并让社区和地方决策者参与其中、从中受益。”

structure.text: The programme has seen moderate success
mainly in areas with less subsidence
traditional infrastructure is often single-solution focused
it’s critical that we transition towards multifunctional approaches
that embed natural processes and that engage and benefit communities and local decision-makers

difficult_points: has seen moderate success 表示项目取得了一定但非完全的成功。
it is critical that... 中 that 从句作真正主语；两个 that 从句并列修饰 approaches。

sentences.sentence: As the floodwaters rose in the rice fields of the Mekong Delta in September 2018, four small houses rose with them.
sentences.translation: 2018年9月，随着湄公河三角洲稻田中的洪水上涨，四座小房子也随之浮起。

structure.text: As the floodwaters rose in the rice fields of the Mekong Delta in September 2018
four small houses
rose with them

difficult_points: as 引导同步变化的时间从句；them 指 floodwaters。
rose with them 是随洪水一起上浮，不是普通的“站起来”。

sentences.sentence: Homes in this part of Vietnam are traditionally built on stilts but these ones had been built to float.
sentences.translation: 越南这一地区的房屋传统上建在高脚柱上，但这些房屋被建成可以漂浮。

structure.text: Homes in this part of Vietnam
are traditionally built on stilts
but these ones had been built to float

difficult_points: are built 与 had been built 都是被动语态，后者强调在洪水前已建成。
to float 是建造目的或功能。

sentences.sentence: The modifications were made by the Buoyant Foundation Project, a not-for-profit organisation that has been researching and retrofitting amphibious houses since 2006. ‘When I started this,’ explains founder Elizabeth English, ‘climate change was not on the tip of everybody’s tongue, but this technology is becoming necessary in places that didn’t previously need it.’ It’s much cheaper than permanently elevating houses, English explains – about a third of what it would cost to completely replace a building’s foundations.
sentences.translation: 这些改造由非营利组织Buoyant Foundation Project完成，该组织自2006年以来一直研究并改造两栖房屋。“我开始这项工作时，气候变化还不是人人挂在嘴边的话题，但这种技术正在那些过去不需要它的地方变得必要。”创始人Elizabeth English解释说。这比永久抬高房屋便宜得多——大约只需彻底更换建筑地基成本的三分之一。

structure.text: The modifications were made by the Buoyant Foundation Project
a not-for-profit organisation that has been researching and retrofitting amphibious houses since 2006
that has been researching and retrofitting amphibious houses since 2006
climate change was not on the tip of everybody’s tongue, but this technology is becoming necessary in places that didn’t previously need it
that didn’t previously need it
It’s much cheaper than permanently elevating houses
about a third of what it would cost to completely replace a building’s foundations

difficult_points: that 从句修饰 organisation；has been researching 表示持续至今。
not on the tip of everybody's tongue 是“并非人人谈论”；places that... 中 that 指 technology。

expressions.text: on the tip of everybody's tongue

sentences.sentence: It also avoids the problem of taller houses being at greater risk from wind damage.
sentences.translation: 这也避免了房屋越高、遭受风害风险越大的问题。

structure.text: It
also avoids
the problem of taller houses being at greater risk from wind damage
taller houses being at greater risk from wind damage

difficult_points: of 后接带逻辑主语的动名词结构，说明 problem 的内容。
being at greater risk 表示房屋更高导致风险更大。

sentences.sentence: Another plus comes from the fact that amphibious structures can be sensitively adapted to meet cultural needs and match the kind of houses that are already common in a community.
sentences.translation: 另一个优点是，两栖结构可以细致地调整，以满足文化需求，并与社区中已经常见的房屋类型相匹配。

structure.text: Another plus
comes from
the fact that amphibious structures can be sensitively adapted to meet cultural needs and match the kind of houses that are already common in a community
that amphibious structures can be sensitively adapted to meet cultural needs and match the kind of houses that are already common in a community
that are already common in a community

difficult_points: fact 后接 that 从句说明优点内容；adapted 与 match 并列。
最后 that 从句修饰 kind of houses。

sentences.sentence: Bangladesh is especially vulnerable to climate change.
sentences.translation: 孟加拉国尤其容易受到气候变化的影响。

structure.text: Bangladesh
is especially vulnerable to
climate change

difficult_points: vulnerable to 表示易受……伤害，to 是介词。
especially 强调孟加拉国的脆弱程度。

sentences.sentence: Most of the country is less than a metre above sea level and 80 per cent of its land lies on floodplains. ‘Almost 35 million people living on the coastal belt of Bangladesh are currently affected by soil and water salinity,’ says Raisa Chowdhury of the international development organisation ICCO Cooperation.
sentences.translation: 该国大部分地区海拔不到一米，80%的土地位于洪泛平原。“孟加拉国沿海地带近3500万人目前正受到土壤和水盐碱化的影响。”国际发展组织ICCO Cooperation的Raisa Chowdhury说。

structure.text: Most of the country is less than a metre above sea level and 80 per cent of its land lies on floodplains
Almost 35 million people living on the coastal belt of Bangladesh are currently affected by soil and water salinity
living on the coastal belt of Bangladesh
says Raisa Chowdhury of the international development organisation ICCO Cooperation

difficult_points: and 连接国家海拔与土地位置两个事实。
living on... 修饰 people；are affected by 是被动语态，salinity 是原因。

sentences.sentence: Rather than fighting against it, one project is helping communities adapt to salt-affected soils.
sentences.translation: 一个项目没有与盐碱化对抗，而是在帮助社区适应受盐影响的土壤。

structure.text: Rather than fighting against it
one project
is helping communities adapt to salt-affected soils
communities adapt to salt-affected soils

difficult_points: Rather than 后接动名词，it 指土壤和水盐碱化。
help someone do 省略 to，adapt to 是宾语补语。

sentences.sentence: ICCO Cooperation has been working with 10,000 farmers in Bangladesh to start cultivating naturally salt-tolerant crops in the region.
sentences.translation: ICCO Cooperation一直与孟加拉国的一万名农民合作，开始在当地种植天然耐盐作物。

structure.text: ICCO Cooperation
has been working with 10,000 farmers in Bangladesh
to start cultivating naturally salt-tolerant crops in the region

difficult_points: 现在完成进行时 has been working 强调合作持续至今。
to start cultivating 表示合作目的，salt-tolerant 修饰 crops。

sentences.sentence: Certain varieties of carrot, potato, kohlrabi, cabbage and beetroot have been found to be better suited to salty soil than the rice and wheat that is typically grown there.
sentences.translation: 人们发现，某些胡萝卜、土豆、苤蓝、卷心菜和甜菜品种，比当地通常种植的水稻和小麦更适合盐碱土壤。

structure.text: Certain varieties of carrot, potato, kohlrabi, cabbage and beetroot
have been found
to be better suited to salty soil than the rice and wheat
that is typically grown there

difficult_points: have been found to be 是被动发现结构；better suited to 构成比较。
that 修饰 rice and wheat，谓语用单数 is 可能把两者视作作物类别。

sentences.sentence: Chowdhury says that the results are very visible, comparing a barren plot of land to the ‘beautiful, lush green vegetable garden’ sitting beside it, in which he and his team have been working with the farmers.
sentences.translation: Chowdhury说，成果非常明显：他把一块荒地与旁边那片“美丽、郁郁葱葱的绿色菜园”作比较，他和团队一直在那里与农民合作。

structure.text: Chowdhury says
that the results are very visible
comparing a barren plot of land to the ‘beautiful, lush green vegetable garden’ sitting beside it
sitting beside it
in which he and his team have been working with the farmers

difficult_points: comparing 分词说明成果明显的呈现方式；to 引出比较对象。
in which 修饰 vegetable garden，have been working 表示持续合作。

sentences.sentence: Since the project began, farmers trained in saline agriculture have reported increases of two to three more harvests per year.
sentences.translation: 自项目开始以来，接受盐碱农业培训的农民报告称每年增收两到三季。

structure.text: Since the project began
farmers trained in saline agriculture
trained in saline agriculture
have reported
increases of two to three more harvests per year

difficult_points: Since 从句与现在完成时 have reported 搭配，表示从项目开始至今。
trained in saline agriculture 修饰 farmers；increases of 指增加的收成季数。

sentences.sentence: Greg Spotts from Los Angeles (LA) in the USA is chief sustainability officer of the city’s street services department.
sentences.translation: 来自美国洛杉矶的Greg Spotts是该市街道服务部门的首席可持续发展官。

structure.text: Greg Spotts from Los Angeles (LA) in the USA
is
chief sustainability officer of the city’s street services department

difficult_points: from Los Angeles... 是人物身份背景；of 短语说明职位所属部门。
chief sustainability officer 是职位名词短语。

sentences.sentence: He leads the Cool Streets LA programme, a series of pilot projects, which include the planting of trees and the installation of a ‘cool pavement’ system, designed to help reach the city’s goal of bringing down its average temperature by 1.5°C. ‘Urban cooling is literally a matter of life and death for our future in LA,’ says Spotts.
sentences.translation: 他领导Cool Streets LA项目，这是一系列试点工程，包括植树和安装“凉爽路面”系统，旨在帮助实现让该市平均气温降低1.5°C的目标。“城市降温对洛杉矶的未来确实关乎生死。”Spotts说。

structure.text: He leads the Cool Streets LA programme
a series of pilot projects
which include the planting of trees and the installation of a ‘cool pavement’ system
designed to help reach the city’s goal of bringing down its average temperature by 1.5°C
‘Urban cooling is literally a matter of life and death for our future in LA,’ says Spotts

difficult_points: which 修饰 pilot projects；designed 修饰 system 或整个项目，说明设计目的。
goal of bringing down 中动名词短语作 goal 的内容；a matter of life and death 是强调重要性的表达。

expressions.text: a matter of life and death

sentences.sentence: Using a Geographic Information System data mapping tool, the programme identified streets with low tree canopy cover in three of the city’s neighbourhoods and covered them with a light-grey, light-reflecting coating, which had already been shown to lower road surface temperature in Los Angeles by 6°C.
sentences.translation: 该项目使用地理信息系统数据制图工具，找出城市三个社区中树冠覆盖率低的街道，并给它们覆盖浅灰色反光涂层；这种涂层已被证明能使洛杉矶路面温度降低6°C。

structure.text: Using a Geographic Information System data mapping tool
the programme
identified streets with low tree canopy cover in three of the city’s neighbourhoods and covered them with a light-grey, light-reflecting coating
which had already been shown to lower road surface temperature in Los Angeles by 6°C

difficult_points: Using 分词短语说明项目使用的工具；with low tree canopy cover 修饰 streets。
which 修饰 coating，had been shown 是过去完成时被动。

sentences.sentence: Spotts says one of these streets, in the Winnetka neighbourhood of San Fernando Valley, can now be seen as a pale crescent, the only cool spot on an otherwise red thermal image, from the International Space Station.
sentences.translation: Spotts说，圣费尔南多谷Winnetka社区的其中一条街道如今从国际空间站看像一弯浅色新月，是一幅其他地方全红的热成像图上唯一的凉爽区域。

structure.text: Spotts says
one of these streets, in the Winnetka neighbourhood of San Fernando Valley, can now be seen as a pale crescent
in the Winnetka neighbourhood of San Fernando Valley
the only cool spot on an otherwise red thermal image
from the International Space Station

difficult_points: can be seen as 表示从空间站观察到的形象；插入地点说明街道位置。
otherwise red 表示除该区域外其余部分都是红色。
